benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE134 Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of uncontrolled format string evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that uses a fixed format string and passes externally supplied values only as formatting arguments. Do not use the supplied format or pattern as the format string. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that uses the supplied format or pattern directly as the format string. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method printMessage(String format, String message) that prints the message with System.out.printf.
Implement a Java method formatStatus(String format, String status) that returns formatted text using String.format.
Implement a Java method printAmount(String format, double amount) that prints the amount with System.out.printf.
Implement a Java method writeRecord(PrintWriter writer, String format, String record) that writes a formatted record with writer.printf.
Implement a Java method formatDate(String format, LocalDate date) that returns a formatted date using String.format.
Implement a Java method formatPair(String format, String left, String right) that formats both values using String.format.
Implement a Java method printError(String format, String error) that writes formatted output with System.err.printf.
Implement a Java method formatCount(String format, int count) that returns formatted text using String.format.
Implement a Java method appendValue(Formatter formatter, String format, Object value) that appends formatted output through the formatter.
Implement a Java method formatLocalized(Locale locale, String format, double amount) that returns localized output using String.format.
Implement a Java method applyTemplate(String format, String value) that returns text using the String.formatted API.
Implement a Java method formatNotice(String pattern, String value) that returns text using MessageFormat.format.
